title: Protoculture back issue sale
wikitext:
[]: Protoculture back issue sale             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Apr 09, 2011 1:52 pm http://www.protoculture.ca/Proto/index.htm Might be interesting if you can find issues with Evangelion related interviews.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 10, 2011 2:36 pm I like how there's a horribly fugly drawing of Rei with Shinji and Eva-01 with them looking all genki ... This one: http://www.protoculture.ca/PA/PA39TOC.htm Which, I believe somebody transcribed the article awhile back? Nice to see back-issues are available but I'll probably pass on this. I already donated tons of anime magazines I had piling up and collecting dust; they were just a waste of space.
